---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Problem or Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What is the current limitation? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? Include API endpoints, UI behavior, or schema changes if relevant -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, examples from other tools, links to related issues or discussions -->

---

> **Note:** For proposals that affect the API, database schema, or core architecture, please open a [Discussion](https://github.com/DisruptiveWorks/archipulse/discussions) first. Read [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) to understand the design decisions already made.
